title: Malik's Rainbow Snacks
synopsis: Baby Malik discovers colorful foods through playful eating adventures, learning about red apples, yellow bananas, green peas, and more rainbow snacks.

pages.text: Malik is hungry! Time for colorful snacks.

illustration.description: A joyful boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes sits in a high chair with red paint splatters dominant across the scene, finger paint aesthetic with dripping red colors everywhere
illustration.alt: Malik sitting excitedly in his high chair

illustration.description: Boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes holding a bright red apple, splashy painterly red dominant scene with paint splatter drips, sensory visual of red finger paint
Child with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes peeling a yellow banana, joyful pure yellow color dominant with paint splatter drips, finger paint aesthetic
Toddler with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes eating green peas, splashy painterly green dominant scene with sensory visual paint splatters, color exploration
Boy with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes munching orange carrot sticks, rainbow colors with orange dominant, paint splatter drips, finger paint aesthetic

pages.text: All done! Malik loves rainbow snacks!

illustration.description: Happy child with short twists, dark brown skin, gentle expressive eyes surrounded by rainbow colors, splashy painterly all colors mixed, joyful pure color explosion with paint drips
illustration.alt: Malik surrounded by colorful food remnants

metadata.illustrationStyle: rainbow colors, splashy painterly, one color dominant per scene, paint splatter drips, sensory visual, joyful pure color, finger paint aesthetic, color exploration

questions.question: What color is the apple Malik eats?
questions.explanation: The apple is red! Red apples are crunchy and delicious.

questions.question: What yellow food does Malik enjoy?
questions.explanation: Malik peels and eats a yellow banana that is soft and sweet!

questions.question: What sound do the green peas make?
questions.explanation: The green peas go 'pop, pop, pop' when Malik eats them!
